feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Internet Communication Framework
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Internet Communication Framework Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change the 403 message
entry.content:
Hi There,

I'm wondering if it's possible to change the text in the 403 message.

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ICF services to be disabled
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Solution Manager functionality Security and Compliance Monitor is suggesting to disable ICF services under the /sap/public node.

Kindly suggest if we can disable these ICF services.


Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ICF services to be disabled
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Solution Manager functionality Security and Compliance Monitor is suggesting to disable ICF services under the /sap/public node.

Kindly suggest if we can disable these ICF services.


Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: TLS 1.2 Enforcement causing errors
entry.content:
Hello,

We have tried to enforce TLS 1.2 using these values in the profile

ssl/ciphersuites = 545:PFS:HIGH::EC_P256:EC_HIGH

ssl/client_ciphersuites = 560:PFS:HIGH::EC_P256:EC_HIGH

SETENV_26 = SECUDIR=$(DIR_INSTANCE)$(DIR_SEP)sec

SETENV_27 = SAPSSL_CLIENT_CIPHERSUITES=560:PFS:HIGH::EC_P256:EC_HIGH

SETENV_28 = SAPSSL_CLIENT_SNI_ENABLED=TRUE

icm/HTTPS/client_sni_enabled = TRUE

ssl/client_sni_enabled = TRUE

But we encountered errors upon starting the application after. Kindly let me know if there are any thing else is needed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Message text in Webgui
entry.content:
Hello,

For our landscape we are looking to put some text messages in SAP Webgui Home Login Screen.

Please can you suggest how can this be achieved or there is any sap help link or Note to refer.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: PHP to OData Payload issue - Error while parsing an XML stream
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to submit a JSON data to SAP which is resulting an Error : Error while parsing an XML stream.

Current payload submitting to the SAP

{

"Aufnr": "000001000703",

"werks": "1200",

"gamng": "106160.000",

"gmein": "KG",

"type": " ",

"message": " "

}

Resulting format in SAP getting :

"{\"Aufnr\":\"000001000703\",\"werks\":\"1200\",\"gamng\":\"106160.000\",\"gmein\":\"KG\",\"type\":\" \",\"message\":\" \"}"

what I am suppose to get in SAP from PHP

what I am getting in SAP from PHP

entry.title: Support for Data Compression in OData V2 response
entry.content: As per the SAP Documentation, How to Enable Compression. I followed the instructions and tried to achieve data compression. Unfortunately, it didn't work as mentioned in the document. I passed the request Header Accept-Encoding and set to gzip and made a HTTP GET request call. On receiving the OData HTTP response there was no change in the content-length nor some information in the response header stating the data has been sent in a compressed format. Do I need to make any configuration changes for the SAP GATEWAY CLIENT or enablement of any sort of Network Compression in order to achieve this?

entry.title: SAP Security notes 3274585 3282663 3269118 3269151
entry.content:
I would like to have information on the implementation of these notes 3274585
3282663
3269118
3269151
.
In particular I would like to know if I can implement them with SNOTE because on some of them it reports as Solution application of the indicated SPs without clearly indicating that alternatively you can implement the corrections with SNOTE


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Query about IF_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content:
When using IF_HTTP_CLIENT at same time from 50 users, will same session be used or different sessions?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to deactivate basic authentication for WEBGUI?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to deactivate basic authentication for WEBGUI?

We are using SAML single sign on but want to block the use of basic authentication for this service? Is this possible?

Kind Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: question abount http response size limit
entry.content:
Dear SAP developers.

Developers in my project will develop ODATA API in S/4HANA.

I worry that large http response may kill ICM.

I know i can restrict http request size using ICM parameter: icm/HTTP/max_request_size_KB.

so, my worries about http request side is cleared.

then, is there other parameter which can restrict http "response" size?

Parameter for memory pipes "mpi/total_size_MB" may seems to do it.

Question is whether "mpi/total_size_MB" intended for restricting the size of a single http response or it is intended for restring the total size of all http response.

or, is there other paramter which can restrict http "response" size?

Best regards.

entry.title: Configuration change from http to https in abap & java servers
entry.content:
Hi

We are trying to configure HTTPS in our landscape and change all existing configuration in HTTP to HTTPS. As we dont have a proper documentation Kindly assist us to proceed further.

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Access via load balancer
entry.content:
Hello

I want to open a browser via a load balancer when executing NWBC or SAML2 from a transaction code.
Is it possible to add the load balancer setting to the table "HTTPURLLOC" to make that setting?

Can it be implemented by adding load balancer settings to the table "HTTPURLLOC" to do that setting?

Please let me know if there is anything else I need to do.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Activate a given web service
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I was told to activate Web Services. I did google but couldn't find 100% satisfying solution.

I have these 2 details:

Service Name: EmployeeMasterDataBundleReplicationRequest_In in component PA_SE_IN

Service URL (Called by middleware) : http://sd1ascs.clientname.loc:443/sap/bc/srt/scs/sap/employeemasterdatabundlerepli1?sap-client=550

I followed this link:

https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-activate-web-services-sap-find-wsdl-end-point-urls-rajesh-dadi

But i am hearing that "its NOT active complete with some connection error while accessing"

My action: I went to tcode: SOAMANAGER and then i chose "Simplified Web Service Configuration".

In the "Search Pattern", i happened to input *Emp*Bundl* and pressed 'GO'.

I happened to see Web service Name or Service Definition(i think) under Internal Name column.

I checked on the box Username/Password(basic) and saved .

I got msg under "Text" column like "activation successful" with config name : 98798777978

Please tell me if i did something wrong?

Thanks

entry.title: Replacement of Standard range table type ISM_ADRNR_RANGE_TAB for S/4 HANA Remediation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm stuck in one of the HANA Remediation while replacing the Range table type i.e., ISM_ADRNR_RANGE_TAB from ECC .

I tried to find the alternative for that, but didn't get any. If anybody knows the alternative for this, please let me know.

Thanks & regards,

Karthik

entry.title: HTTPURLLOC for View Designer
entry.content:
When going to SE80 and opening a Webdynpro view (Layout tab), it is using our wildcard /WEBDYNPRO/* rule in HTTPURLLOC to render the preview. We are wanting to add an entry so that it uses the normal application server hostname. Can you please advise what the entry / context for this would be?
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: logoff and redirect login prompt does not work
entry.content:
Hello

We have a service in ITS Mobile, this service work fine, but when we try a logoff, the session ended successfully, but does not offer the option to re-enter credentials. (log off and Redirect to login prompt).

This is a problem for us, this browser is used by a radio frequency device, which needs to continually change users.

Services in SICF transaction are active.

/sap/bc/gui/sap/its/zlm00

/sap/public/bc/icf/logoff

thansk in advance.

BR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP HTTP security
entry.content:
Hello,

In my system SAP ECC that I want to change the error message in path '/' on sicf. I try to change on service name "default_host" but it affected only sub directory not affected in '/' .

Please suggest for change it.

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: HTTP/1 to HTTP/2
entry.content:
We are preparing to move from HTTP/1 to HTTP/2 in all environments. Can you provide guidance on how to transition from HTTP/1 to HTTP/2 without any negative impact on the business. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Odata $batch with filter
entry.content: Hi, I created a simple odata using $batch with filter my problem is the IT_FILTER_SELECT_OPTION is empty what could be the issue? why its not populating the standard ITAB is there something wrong in my $batch?
